name: Chicken Parisienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken breasts lightly with salt, pepper, paprika, and rosemary.
2. Place the chicken in a 4-quart slow cooker.
3. Mix water, cream of mushroom soup, sour cream, and sliced mushrooms; add flour and stir until well combined.
4. Pour the liquid mixture over the chicken.
5. Cook on low (225°F) for 6 to 8 hours. Alternatively, cook on high for 2-1/2 to 3 hours, adding the sour cream and flour during the last 30 minutes of cooking time.
6. Serve hot over rice or noodles.
